name: Ring Buffer
def: A fixed-capacity FIFO over a circular array using head/tail indices modulo capacity.
problem: Bounded, allocation-free producer/consumer queue with predictable latency.
mechanism: Two indices advance modulo capacity; full/empty distinguished by counts or one wasted slot. SPSC variants are lock-free with acquire/release fences.
benefits: Lock-free SPSC is trivial and fast
limits: MPMC variants are subtle and contention-prone
failures: False sharing of head/tail on the same cache line
whenNot: When backpressure semantics must be rich
myths: "Lock-free is always faster" — under heavy contention it can be slower than a mutexed queue
